top_signals.title: Rural Japan tries to draw wealthy tourists with $40,000 custom swords
Wärtsilä Secures FSRU Service Agreement with Pardus Energy
top_signals.summary: Wärtsilä has signed a five-year lifecycle agreement with Ireland-based Pardus Energy to support the operation of the floating storage and regasification unit (FSRU) TURQUOISE P.The agreement includes contract management, maintenance planning and spare parts support for the vessel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Grain Shipments Strong, but Weakness on the Horizon
top_signals.summary: “Global grain shipments have increased 13% y/y so far this year, supported by strong wheat, maize and soya bean exports from the Americas and Europe. Improved harvests across most major exporters have boosted their export surpluses, driving higher shipments to Asia…
